nodes.label:
Base Class Object
vptr → Base VTable

Derived Class Object
vptr → Derived VTable

svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Method Overriding</text>

  <!-- Parent Class -->
  <rect x="50" y="60" width="120" height="100" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Parent Class
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="60" y="100" width="100" height="20" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="113" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    method()
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Child Class -->
  <rect x="250" y="60" width="120" height="100" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Child Class
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="260" y="100" width="100" height="20" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="113" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    method()
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Inheritance Arrow -->
  <path d="M180 110 L240 110" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="210" y="100" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    extends
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Override Arrow -->
  <path d="M110 140 L110 180 L310 180 L310 140" stroke="#E91E63" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="210" y="170" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#E91E63" opacity="0">
    overrides
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Method Call -->
  <rect x="160" y="220" width="100" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="235" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Object obj = new Child();
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="250" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    obj.method();
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Result -->
  <rect x="160" y="280" width="100" height="30" fill="#4CAF50" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="300" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Child's method
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="10" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
</svg>
